step.title: Load Bundle
step.goal: Read the entire bundle into working memory before any grilling begins. This step runs ONCE per session — subsequent steps may loop, but the bundle load is a one-time orientation activity.

substep.title: Locate the Bundle
substep.ask:
Which ticket bundle should I grill?
If you just completed ticket-orient, paste the bundle directory path it produced (under {shared_folder}/tickets/{slug}/).
If you are resuming an existing draft, provide the bundle directory path or the ticket file path.

substep.title: Read Bundle Files
substep.action:
Read ALL three files completely. No skimming, no offset/limit. Extract from the ticket file: - Frontmatter: kind, status, aliases, tags (primary tag is tags[0]), owner, researcher, date, last_updated, parent, children, depends_on - Body: user-request restatement (written by ticket-orient)
Extract from the research file: - Frontmatter: parent ticket alias - Body: any prior research findings (empty on a fresh bundle)
Extract from the questions file: - Frontmatter: parent ticket alias - Body: any prior Q↔R entries (empty on a fresh bundle)
Extract from the worklog file: - Body: the Orient Summary + Open Threads (written by ticket-orient at handoff)
Store in session: - {{session.primary_tag}} - {{session.slug}} - {{session.shared_folder}} (derived from the bundle path) - {{session.orient_summary}} (the full Orient Summary block) - {{session.prior_questions}} (list of resolved questions from prior turns, if resuming)

substep.title: Read CONTEXT.md (if exists)
substep.action:
Re-read CONTEXT.md or CONTEXT-MAP.md to refresh the glossary in working memory. ticket-orient already read it once, but a resumption session may have lost that state, and the glossary may have evolved between sessions.
If neither exists, set {{session.glossary}} = "none" — lazy-create will trigger on the first resolved term during this skill.

substep.title: Read Linked Decision Records (if any)
substep.action: If the ticket frontmatter `children:` array references any `decision-YYYY-MM-DD-*` aliases, resolve and read each one. These are decisions already locked in prior turns. They constrain what ticket-grill is allowed to revisit — a DR's decision is immutable.

substep.title: Display Bundle Summary

section.title: Single-load discipline
section.description: This step runs ONCE. Subsequent steps may loop (step 2 -> step 6 -> loop back to step 2), but the bundle is read once into session state. Re-reading on every loop iteration wastes context and risks drift (a step 5 edit changes the file; re-reading it in step 2 of the next iteration would mix turn-N writes with turn-(N+1) reads). Instead, the agent maintains session state and edits files purposefully in step 5.

section.title: Resumption is normal
section.description: ticket-grill is designed to resume cleanly. A session may have run through three turns previously, hit context pressure, compacted, and now restart at step 1 of ticket-grill with the same bundle path. The Orient Summary + prior Q&A entries + research findings on disk are sufficient to pick up exactly where the previous session left off — no separate handoff document is required.

rules.rule: Missing bundle file -> halt and direct user to re-run ticket-orient or fix the bundle
Malformed frontmatter -> halt and surface the validation error
Frontmatter status not in {draft, ready, active} -> halt; the bundle is not in a grillable state

No Orient Summary section in the questions file AND no prior Q&A -> warn; the user may have skipped ticket-orient. Offer to proceed anyway (degraded — first turn must re-do orient work in-skill) or to abort and run ticket-orient first
